economic_notes: T'Sou-ke Development Corporation is the GBE with total assets of $5,668,166 and net loss of $5,219 in 2020. T'Sou-ke Economic Development Limited Partnership (99.99% interest) is inactive. COVID-19 pandemic noted as subsequent event with operational impacts.
notes: Fiscal year is March 31, 2020 — not 2024. Band segment 'Other' revenue of $3,652,535 is unusually large and likely includes fisheries/commercial revenues. Investment in T'Sou-ke Development Corporation recorded under modified equity method at $1,924,694 (GBE with $5.7M in assets). Demand loan of $3,093,381 that existed in 2019 was repaid in 2020. Contingent liability of $3,133,756 for on-reserve housing loan guarantees. Five lawsuits pending with undetermined outcomes. COVID-19 subsequent event noted. No schedule of remuneration disclosed. OSR calculated as total revenue minus ISC ($1,548,501) minus CMHC ($108,365) minus Federal-Other ($1,485,457) minus Provincial ($41,517) = $3,839,726. Capital projects segment shows $172,608 revenue with $3,805 expenses — likely a pass-through capital transfer.
